summary_en: 0 shares acquired in May 2026 (May 11–31). Authorized program: 700,000 shares (3.38% S/O), ¥2.0B upper limit, May 11–July 31 execution window, open-market method. Cumulative to May 31: 0 shares, ¥0.
title_en: Notice regarding status of acquisition of treasury stock (pursuant to articles of incorporation based on Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: Nippon Ceramic filed a progress report on treasury stock acquisition as of May 31, 2026. During the May 11–31 period (settlement basis), the company acquired 0 shares for ¥0. The underlying board resolution from May 8, 2026 authorized acquisition of up to 700,000 shares (3.38% of issued stock excluding treasury shares) for a maximum of ¥2.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, with an execution window of May 11 through July 31, 2026. As of May 31, cumulative acquisitions under this authorization remain at 0 shares and ¥0, indicating no purchases during the first three weeks of the program.
